title: invoice model generates formal payment requests
content:
# invoice model generates formal payment requests

`powerhouse/invoice` (31 ops) is the second-largest model by operation count. Generates formal invoices from subscription and billing data.

## Cross-Model References

- SubscriptionInstance → Invoice (subscription charges become invoice line items)
- References [[payment-terms model defines payment conditions and schedules]] for due dates and terms
- May reference [[billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries]] as source data
- Feeds into [[account-transactions model tracks financial transaction records]] when payments are recorded

## Position in Ecosystem

Reporting zone. High operation count (31) suggests complex line item management, tax handling, and status workflow.

---

description: 31 operations (second largest) — creates formal invoices with line items, tax calculations, and payment status tracking
